response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the Japanese on-screen lyrics and the reference JSON perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Used the reference JSON lyrics for both 'Starlight' and 'Love Me!', adding the spoken MC portion manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Handled rapid tempo transitions and instrumental pauses to keep subtitles fully audio-synchronized.

subtitles.original: 願いのかけらを灯した
subtitles.english: Lighting up the fragments of our wishes,

subtitles.original: 君の腕を引いて
subtitles.english: I pull your arm...

subtitles.original: どこへだってきらり
subtitles.english: Anywhere, glittering,

subtitles.original: 飛んでゆけるんだ
subtitles.english: We can fly away!

subtitles.original: ちょっと不安な日も
subtitles.english: Even on slightly uneasy days,

subtitles.original: 魔法をかけてハッピー
subtitles.english: Cast a spell to make it happy,

subtitles.original: 百人力で乗り越えていこう
subtitles.english: Let's overcome it with a hundredfold strength!

subtitles.original: アクアブルーに染まる
subtitles.english: Stained in aqua blue,

subtitles.original: 大空めがけた
subtitles.english: Aiming for the great sky,

subtitles.original: 鼓動が弾んでく
subtitles.english: Our heartbeats are racing!

subtitles.original: We can fly そう僕らは
subtitles.english: We can fly! Yes, we...

subtitles.original: この日をずっと待ってたんだ
subtitles.english: ...have been waiting for this day all along.

subtitles.original: まだ醒めないで
subtitles.english: Please don't wake up yet,

subtitles.original: Starlight
subtitles.english: Starlight!

subtitles.original: 僕らは止まらない
subtitles.english: We won't stop!

subtitles.original: その光が消える
subtitles.english: Until that light fades,

subtitles.original: 1秒前まで走り続けるよ
subtitles.english: We'll keep running until one second before!

subtitles.original: 無限の宇宙に響いた
subtitles.english: Echoing in the infinite universe,

subtitles.original: キミを照らす声を
subtitles.english: Hold tight to the voice...

subtitles.original: 強く抱いて きらり
subtitles.english: ...that shines on you, glittering...

subtitles.original: 輝いてゆけ
subtitles.english: ...and keep on shining!

subtitles.original: いつだって愛情が先に
subtitles.english: Love always runs ahead...

subtitles.original: 走り出す 僕らのランウェイを
subtitles.english: ...starting our runway.

subtitles.original: 頑丈とラッキーを盾に
subtitles.english: With sturdiness and luck as our shield,

subtitles.original: 進みます ア・ユ・レディ？
subtitles.english: We move forward. Are you ready?

subtitles.original: 転んだって 泣いたって僕ら
subtitles.english: Even if we fall or cry, we...

subtitles.original: 慣れてるよ 受け身はパーフェクト
subtitles.english: ...are used to it; our recovery is perfect.

subtitles.original: 笑ってくれてありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for smiling for me,

subtitles.original: また僕は歌えるよ
subtitles.english: I can sing once again!

subtitles.original: 人生は不安ばっか
subtitles.english: Life is full of anxieties,

subtitles.original: 正直自信はないけど
subtitles.english: And honestly, I have no confidence, but...

subtitles.original: 君の隣だけは
subtitles.english: The space right next to you...

subtitles.original: 譲る気はないのです！
subtitles.english: ...is the one place I will never give up!

subtitles.original: 僕らが出会えた奇跡のセカイ
subtitles.english: This miraculous world where we met,

subtitles.original: 君の目にどう映るかな
subtitles.english: I wonder how it looks through your eyes.

subtitles.original: 青より澄み渡る
subtitles.english: A sky clearer than blue,

subtitles.original: 僕だけの大空だといいな
subtitles.english: I hope it's a great sky just for me.

subtitles.original: 不確かな永遠より僕は
subtitles.english: Rather than an uncertain eternity, I......

subtitles.original: 二人で過ごす今を歌いたいんだ
subtitles.english: ...want to sing of the present we spend together.

subtitles.original: この惑星の片隅 続く
subtitles.english: In a corner of this planet, continuing on...

subtitles.original: あいまいみーゆえにラブミ
subtitles.english: It's ambiguous, so love me!

subtitles.original: ナンセンスな現実が
subtitles.english: A nonsensical reality...

subtitles.original: 心を乱していった
subtitles.english: ...has disordered my heart.

subtitles.original: ラッキーの天秤の裏側にある
subtitles.english: On the flip side of luck's scales lies...

subtitles.original: アンラッキー
subtitles.english: ...bad luck.

subtitles.original: 転んだって 泣いたって僕ら
subtitles.english: Even if we fall or cry, we...

subtitles.original: 立ち上がる 七転八倒さ
subtitles.english: ...will stand back up; we're resilient.

subtitles.original: 笑ってくれてありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for smiling for me,

subtitles.original: まだ僕は走れるよ
subtitles.english: I can still run!

subtitles.original: 人生の期待感は
subtitles.english: The expectations of life......

subtitles.original: 正直膨らむばっかでさ
subtitles.english: ...honestly just keep expanding.

subtitles.original: 君の心の中
subtitles.english: Inside your heart......

subtitles.original: 灯る陽だまりなのです
subtitles.english: ...is a sunny spot that lights up.

subtitles.original: 僕らが暮らしてる奇跡の時代
subtitles.english: This miraculous world where we live,

subtitles.original: 君のことどう照らすかな
subtitles.english: I wonder how it shines upon you.

subtitles.original: 星より煌めいた
subtitles.english: If I could become a sun......

subtitles.original: 僕らしい太陽になれたら
subtitles.english: ...shining in my own way, brighter than stars.

subtitles.original: 不確かな永遠より僕は
subtitles.english: Rather than an uncertain eternity, I......

subtitles.original: 二人で過ごす今を楽しんでいたい
subtitles.english: ...want to enjoy the present we spend together.

subtitles.original: この惑星の片隅 続く
subtitles.english: In a corner of this planet, continuing on......

subtitles.original: あいまいみーゆえにラブミ
subtitles.english: It's ambiguous, so love me!

subtitles.original: 今日は本当にありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you all so much for today!

subtitles.original: ここまで活動できたのは
subtitles.english: The reason I've been able to come this far......

subtitles.original: 応援してくれたみんなのおかげです！
subtitles.english: ...is all thanks to everyone who supported me!

subtitles.original: いつも本当にありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much as always!

subtitles.original: みんな、大好きだぞー！
subtitles.english: I love you all!

subtitles.original: ああ健やかなる時も
subtitles.english: Ah, in health......

subtitles.original: ああ病める時もきっと
subtitles.english: ...and in sickness, surely......

subtitles.original: 伝えたいよこのメロディ
subtitles.english: I want to convey this melody to you.

subtitles.original: 僕らが出会えた奇跡のセカイ
subtitles.english: This miraculous world where we met,

subtitles.original: 君の目にどう映るかな//
subtitles.english: I wonder how it looks through your eyes.

subtitles.original: 青より澄み渡る
subtitles.english: A sky clearer than blue,

subtitles.original: 僕だけの大空だといいな
subtitles.english: I hope it's a great sky just for me.

subtitles.original: 不確かな永遠より僕は
subtitles.english: Rather than an uncertain eternity, I......

subtitles.original: 二人で過ごす今を歌いたいんだ
subtitles.english: ...want to sing of the present we spend together.

subtitles.original: この惑星の片隅 続く
subtitles.english: In a corner of this planet, continuing on......

subtitles.original: あいまいみーゆえにラブミ
subtitles.english: It's ambiguous, so love me!

subtitles.original: アイラブユー伝えたいの
subtitles.english: I want to tell you, 'I love you'!
